_about: List-price ranges for common Dubai services, harvested from public web sources. These are ADVERTISED prices (sell-side), Dubai-wide, NOT verified and NOT area-specific. They power Mizan's 'market estimate' backdrop layer only. Do not present as verified paid data.

categories.label: AC service / cleaning (split unit)
categories.note: Basic split-unit service/clean. Wild spread AED 50–600 reported; deep clean to ~350. Duct/central systems are a separate, far higher category.

categories.label: Men's haircut
categories.note: Budget barbers from ~30–80; premium fades 150–180; luxury experiences 300+.

categories.label: Salon — cut + blow-dry
categories.note: ESTIMATE — not individually web-verified to the same depth; treat as rough.

categories.label: Gym membership (monthly)
categories.note: Budget chains from 99–200; mid 250–450; premium 800–1500+. Avg business-district ~321. Location adds 30–50%.

categories.label: GP consultation
categories.note: Private community clinics 150–300; hospital outpatient 300–500. Insurance co-pay separate.

categories.label: Dental cleaning (scale + polish)
categories.note: Offers from 99–149; common 200–350; deep cleaning higher.

categories.label: Home deep clean (2-bed)
categories.note: Two cleaners, 4–6 hrs. Regular (non-deep) cleaning is ~35–50/hr instead.

categories.label: Handyman (per hour)
categories.note: Common 80–150/hr; min call-out ~99–129; specialist plumbing/electrical higher.

categories.label: Car minor service (oil + check)
categories.note: Minor service (oil + inspection) ~350–800 independent; bare oil change 150–350; dealers up to 1400.

categories.label: Movers (1-bed, within Dubai)
categories.note: Basic local 1-bed ~800–1500; avg ~1100; full-service with packing pushes higher.

area_premium._about: Rough cost multipliers by area, applied to the synthetic paid-seed only. NOT from web data. Replace with real signal as paid data accumulates.
